name: Share host Claude Code config
description: Bind-mounts the host ~/.claude into the devcontainer and selectively symlinks safe subpaths (agents, commands, skills, hooks, rules, plugins, ...) into $HOME/.claude so user config persists across rebuilds. MCP/settings.json excluded by default.

link_claude_md.description: Symlink CLAUDE.md from host staging mount.

link_agents.description: Symlink agents/ from host staging mount.

link_commands.description: Symlink commands/ from host staging mount.

link_skills.description: Symlink skills/ from host staging mount. Opt in if your skills are self-contained markdown with no host-path references.

link_hooks.description: Symlink hooks/ from host staging mount. Opt in only if all binaries referenced by hooks (e.g. rtk, ghx) are available inside the container.

link_rules.description: Symlink rules/ from host staging mount.

link_plugins.description: Symlink plugins/ from host staging mount. Opt in only if host and container share the same arch and all plugin binaries/paths are valid inside the container.

link_sessions.description: Symlink sessions/ from host staging mount. Opt in for cross-container session analytics.

link_projects.description: Symlink projects/ from host staging mount. Opt in for token analytics (ccusage) or shared auto-memory (requires matching workspaceFolder).

link_tasks.description: Symlink tasks/ from host staging mount.

link_history.description: Symlink history.jsonl from host staging mount.

link_claude_json.description: Symlink claude.json from host staging mount. Only if portable across environments.

link_settings.description: Symlink settings.json from host staging mount. Avoid if settings.json references host-only MCP server commands.
